sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30364" key="e)gkolpismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκολπ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n30364.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vaginal douche</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clyster</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:153" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.153</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
